title: Klagenfurt, Carinthia — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Klagenfurt, Carinthia: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Klagenfurt is a city in Carinthia with a population of 102,618. The sunny capital of Carinthia, set on the shores of Lake Wörthersee, known for its Mediterranean flair, the Minimundus miniature park, and outdoor recreation.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
